themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by Jordan n...". Word-study detail reinforces "וִֽישַׁבְתֶּם: and dwell - properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet)...".

themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by Jordan n...". themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "King Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming...". Word-study detail reinforces "מֶ֣לֶךְ: And king - a king".
